headline: Winners And Losers Of Q1: International Paper (NYSE:IP) Vs The Rest Of The Industrial Packaging Stocks
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who didn’t). Let’s take a look at how industrial packaging stocks fared in Q1, starting with International Paper (NYSE:IP).

headline: IP Expands Capabilities in West Coast Region With NORPAC Acquisition
summary: International Paper expands its West Coast footprint with the $360M NORPAC acquisition, adding containerboard capacity and boosting packaging capabilities.
